item.title: Build Agents with Microsoft Fabric & Copilot Studio
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: How Microsoft Fabric, Business Performance Analytics, and Copilot Studio turn Dynamics 365 and Power Platform data into AI agents you can ask questions of — from Fabric Link vs Synapse Link to building a data agent end to end.
